title: Audit ferrolearn-metrics vs sklearn: close gaps, add API proof tests
description:
Step 8 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Largest historical gap (~24% coverage in old report). Scope: sklearn.metrics — classification, regression, ranking, clustering, distance/pairwise, plotting, scorers. ~72 public functions + classes.

Related existing issues: #149 (make_scorer/get_scorer), #150 (d2 score variants), #151 (class_likelihood_ratios)
